description: A dynamic warehouse site plan built using React Konva, featuring an interactive editor, color mapping, tooltips, and clickable lot areas to help clients manage warehouse units efficiently.
A digital e-signature workflow that enables document uploads, digital signing, approval tracking, and user-friendly document management.
A full product management system created using Next.js, TanStack Query, REST APIs, and shadcn/ui including CRUD, search filters, pagination, and validation using Zod.
